signals: OpenAI lanza GPT-5.4 integrando razonamiento avanzado y flujos agenticos en ChatGPT y API.
Google despliega la familia Gemini 3.1 abarcando desde modelos Flash-Lite hasta razonamiento Deep Think.
La infraestructura de hardware avanza hacia Intel 18A con soluciones eFPGA para reducir riesgos de diseño.
Synopsys y Cadence escalan la verificación asistida por IA para hardware de próxima generación.
NVIDIA impulsa la soberanía tecnológica en Europa mediante el concepto de infraestructura de inteligencia.
risks: Riesgo financiero extremo en diseño de chips: un error en nodos como Intel 18A cuesta decenas de millones.
Vulnerabilidad social ante interacciones de IA naturales capaces de manipular emociones humanas.
Cuellos de botella en la validación post-silicio ante la creciente complejidad de las MMU para IA.
watch: Adopción de flujos agenticos en el ecosistema Codex tras la actualización GPT-5.4.
Impacto de Gemini 3 Deep Think en la resolución de problemas científicos y de ingeniería.
Ejecución de proyectos de infraestructura de IA soberana en la Unión Europea tras el GTC Paris.

items.title: GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro are rolling out now in ChatGPT. GPT-5.4 is also now available in the API and Codex. GPT-5.4 brings our advances in reasoning...
items.summary: GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro are rolling out now in ChatGPT. GPT-5.4 is also now available in the API and Codex. GPT-5.4 brings our advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows into one frontier model. We're rolling out plugins in Codex. Codex now works seamlessly out of the box with the most important tools builders already use, like , and more. [developers.openai.com/codex/plugins](https://t.co/PQDsLqHGA6) Students: build something real in the Codex Creator Challenge, powered by Try new tools. Have fun. Break things. Repeat. $10K in OpenAI API credits in prizes.
items.why: Salto generacional clave con enfoque en razonamiento y agentes autónomos; marca el nuevo estado del arte en modelos de frontera.

items.title: A new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create music
items.summary: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.
items.why: Añade capacidades creativas multimodales competitivas a Gemini, aunque con impacto limitado en productividad empresarial.

items.title: Silicon Insurance: Why eFPGA is Cheaper Than a Respin — and Why It Matters in the Intel 18A Era
items.summary: As semiconductor technology advances into increasingly complex and expensive process nodes, the economic and technical risks associated with ASIC design have grown dramatically. At advanced nodes such as Intel 18A, the cost of a single design error can escalate into tens of millions of dollars, compounded by months of delay.… Read More The post Silicon Insurance: Why eFPGA is Cheaper Than a Respin — and Why It Matters in the Intel 18A Era appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Crucial para la viabilidad económica de chips personalizados en nodos avanzados; reduce el riesgo de fallos costosos en silicio.

items.title: Synopsys Advances Hardware Assisted Verification for the AI Era
items.summary: At the 2026 Synopsys Converge Event, Synopsys announced a broad set of new products and platform upgrades, with its hardware-assisted verification (HAV) announcement emerging as a key highlight within that lineup. A key aspect of this announcement was moving beyond a hardware centric model to a more scalable, programmable … Read More The post Synopsys Advances Hardware Assisted Verification for the AI Era appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: La automatización de la verificación es un cuello de botella crítico para acelerar el despliegue de hardware de IA.

items.title: Say hello to Gemini 3.1 Flash Live. ![Image 3: 🗣️](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f5e3.svg) Our latest audio model delivers more natural conversations...
items.summary: Say hello to Gemini 3.1 Flash Live. ![Image 3: 🗣️](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f5e3.svg) Our latest audio model delivers more natural conversations with improved function calling –making it more useful and informed. Here’s what’s new ![Image 4: 🧵](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9f5.svg)
items.why: Mejora drástica en la latencia y utilidad de modelos de voz, esencial para interfaces conversacionales en tiempo real.

items.title: It’s a Sign: AI Platform for Teaching American Sign Language Aims to Bridge Communication Gaps
items.summary: American Sign Language is the third most prevalent language in the United States — but there are vastly fewer AI tools developed with ASL data than data representing the country’s most common languages, English and Spanish. NVIDIA, the American Society for Deaf Children and creative agency Hello Monday are helping close this gap with Signs, […]
items.why: Aplicación valiosa de IA para accesibilidad, aunque con impacto marginal en el mercado global de computación.

items.title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed
items.summary: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.
items.why: Avance en generación de imágenes consistente a alta velocidad para despliegues masivos.

items.title: As AI gets better at holding natural conversations, we need to understand how these interactions impact society. We’re sharing new research into how AI might...
items.summary: As AI gets better at holding natural conversations, we need to understand how these interactions impact society. We’re sharing new research into how AI might be misused to exploit emotions or manipulate people into making harmful choices. ![Image 6: 🧵](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9f5.svg) The media could not be played.
items.why: Investigación crítica para mitigar riesgos de manipulación a medida que la IA se vuelve indistinguible de humanos.

items.title: Post-Silicon Validating an MMU. Innovation in Verification
items.summary: Some post-silicon bugs are unavoidable, but we’re getting better at catching them before we ship. Here we look at a method based on a bare-metal exerciser to stress-test the MMU. Paul Cunningham (GM, Verification at Cadence), Raúl Camposano (Silicon Catalyst, entrepreneur, former Synopsys CTO and lecturer at Stanford, EE292A)… Read More The post Post-Silicon Validating an MMU. Innovation in Verification appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: La validación post-silicio de unidades de gestión de memoria es vital para la estabilidad de sistemas de IA a gran escala.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.
items.why: Complementa la estrategia de Google para dominar la interacción hombre-máquina por voz con baja latencia.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.why: Modelos ligeros y eficientes son fundamentales para la viabilidad económica de aplicaciones de IA de alto volumen.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
items.summary: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.
items.why: Actualización competitiva directa contra los modelos de frontera de OpenAI para tareas complejas.

items.title: Gemini 3 Deep Think: Advancing science, research and engineering
items.summary: Our most specialized reasoning mode is now updated to solve modern science, research and engineering challenges.
items.why: Especialización en razonamiento profundo para ciencia e ingeniería; posiciona a Google en el sector de I+D avanzado.

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: Photos of animals being identified by the SpeciesNet AI model
items.why: Modelo especializado de código abierto para impacto ambiental, con relevancia limitada fuera de su nicho.

items.title: NVIDIA CEO Drops the Blueprint for Europe’s AI Boom
items.summary: At GTC Paris — held alongside VivaTech, Europe’s largest tech event — NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang delivered a clear message: Europe isn’t just adopting AI — it’s building it. “We now have a new industry, an AI industry, and it’s now part of the new infrastructure, called intelligence infrastructure, that will be used […]
items.why: Define la estrategia geopolítica de NVIDIA para asegurar mercados mediante la creación de infraestructuras nacionales.
